text:
Created attachment 202470
most recent kernel dump and dmesg

Since upgrading to 12.0, one of my machines (the oldest) periodically crashes. The crashes seem to be more frequent when using a geli-encrypted tmp; this is currently off (unencrypted tmp), but a crash still happens every few days.

Attached the most recent kernel dump and dmesg.

-- Martin
